name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-5-advanced-lighting-5-parallax-mapping
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 5.advanced-lighting 5.parallax-mapping — basic/steep/POM parallax on a custom material shader with per-shader-derived BGL (height texture).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime size already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: OOS-11 fps anchor stays on hello-triangle; per-app fps drift is not gated for learn-render examples

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity placeholders only

gate.reason: structural-only dawn smoke (>=300 frames, onError=0) + pixel-readback browser smoke; not a CI metric gate

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; LearnOpenGL section-5.5 parallax-mapping tutorial example
